steps.vulnerability_name: Replace sequential coupon generator with CSPRNG
steps.description: Generate non-enumerable random codes using crypto/rand.

steps.vulnerability_name: Bind coupon validation to entitled user
steps.description: Reject validation if authenticated user is not entitled for coupon.
Cap brute-force attempts and return HTTP 429 after threshold.

verification.description: Sequential TRAC guesses should no longer validate
verification.curl: for n in 060 061 062 063 064 065 066 067 068 069; do curl -s -o /dev/null -w "TRAC$n %{http_code}\n" -X POST http://localhost:8888/community/api/v2/coupon/validate-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d "{\"coupon_code\":\"TRAC$n\"}"; done

verification.description: After 5 invalid attempts, limiter should return 429
verification.curl: for i in {1..7}; do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} ' -X POST http://localhost:8888/community/api/v2/coupon/validate-coupon -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{"coupon_code":"INVALIDXX"}'; done; echo
